programme.title: Sprinter Factory
programme.desc: These are the girls running as fast as they can to be Jamaica's new sprint champions in a country obsessed with its athletes. This is the story of the Champs national youth athletics competition that could change their lives.

programme.title: Run the code: is algorave the future of dance music? | The black art: wet plate collodion photography
programme.desc: Run the code: is algorave the future of dance music? | The black art: wet plate collodion photography

programme.title: With Woman: the high stakes for a home-birth midwife in the US
programme.desc: Star is a Black midwife who helps Black women give birth in the comfort of their homes, in the state of Illinois. She is part of a long-established African-American tradition of home-birth midwifery, which is currently in a legal gray area across a number of US states, with midwives unable to obtain a license to practice. Despite this legal peril, and motivated by the high maternal mortality rate for Black women, Star continues in her role. Here we see Star guide Raven, who is expecting her first child, through her last month of pregnancy, from prenatal visits to the intimate experience of giving birth on her kitchen floor.

programme.title: How a conference call sparked America's abortion obsession | The Daphne Project
programme.desc: How a conference call sparked America's abortion obsession | The Daphne Project: 'Journalism was her life': Daphne Caruana Galizia's family speak out

programme.title: Cinema of Ukraine: artists reflect on modern history, culture and people
programme.desc: Presented in collaboration with the Kyiv-based Docudays UA film festival, these award-winning movies offer insight into the modern history of the country, its culture and its people. In This Rain Will Never Stop, directed by Alina Gorlova, we meet 20-year-old Andriy Suleyman, who escaped Syria with his family and found refuge in Ukraine, his mother's homeland. Shot in striking black and white, the film is a sophisticated vision of war zones and the scars they leave.

programme.title: Saintmaking: the canonisation of Derek Jarman by queer 'nuns'
programme.desc: This year marks the 30th anniversary of film-maker Derek Jarman's canonisation by an activist group of gay male 'nuns' known as the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence. At the time in 1991, Derek Jarman was the most prominent person in the UK living openly with HIV. He was outspoken, radical and unapologetically queer. The perfect antidote, in the Sisters' eyes, to Ian McKellen's acceptance of a knighthood in the 1991 new year honours.

programme.title: Funeral poverty: one woman's battle to pay for her son's burial
programme.desc: One suddenly bereaved mother, already in debt, has to find thousands of pounds to pay for her son's funeral. The funeral business is an unregulated industry, with providers criticised for taking advantage of vulnerable, grieving families, who can then feel obliged to pay large sums of money for an appropriate goodbye. Across the UK the average funeral cost stands at £4,271, having risen 122% since 2004

programme.title: The pioneering New York prison program transforming lives | Keeping Panini alive in the digital age
programme.desc: Writing wrongs: the pioneering New York prison program transforming lives | Meet the stickerheads: the people keeping Panini alive in the digital age

programme.title: The Climate and the Cross
programme.desc: An internal battle is simmering among US Christians over whether climate change is a call to protect the Earth, the work of God to be welcomed, or does not exist at all.

programme.title: Escape from Syria: Rania's odyssey
programme.desc: Rania Mustafa Ali, 20, filmed her journey from the ruins of Kobane in Syria to Austria. Her footage shows what many refugees face on their perilous journey to Europe. Rania is cheated by smugglers, teargassed and beaten at the Macedonian border. She risks drowning in the Mediterranean, travelling in a boat meant to hold 15 people but stuffed with over 50.

programme.title: Ticket touting | Inner-city cricket: The West. Fighting for new blood.
programme.desc: Ticket touting | Inner-city cricket: The West. Fighting for new blood.

programme.title: The Battle for Myanmar's Buddhist spirit
programme.desc: In Myanmar, different groups of Buddhist monks are battling with how to deal with the country's minority Muslim population. While some advocate peace, others, such as the extremist Ma Ba Tha, are stoking up hatred and violence. The Guardian visited Myanmar to investigate how the monks' actions are threatening to destabilise the country's newly established democracy

programme.title: Second innings
programme.desc: From Afghanistan to London, three boys build a new life playing cricket. Tucked away in suburban south London, matches take place every week for young and often traumatised asylum seekers. Many have fled war and have been separated from their families. The Refugee Cricket project, organised by the Refugee Council, provides not only a chance to play and make friends, but also to access advice and support as they navigate the complex asylum system and other challenges in their new home

programme.title: Bhutan Mountain Man: video diaries from a lone glaciologist
programme.desc: Phuntsho Tshering is Bhutan's glacier specialist and the only person authorised to climb the Himalayan country's sacred mountains. He spends months away from home measuring the rapidly melting glaciers, while faithfully recording videos on his phone for his daughter, Yangchen. Yangchen in turn has an inner dilemma. She prays that her father won't disturb the Snow Lion, the mythical embodiment of the glacier which the Bhutanese believe could provoke a natural disaster. Meanwhile at school she is taught that the biggest threat to survival of the Snow Lion is not her father, but climate change.

programme.title: Erica: man made
programme.desc: Erica is 23. She has a beautiful, neutral face and speaks with a synthesised voice. She has a degree of autonomy – but can't move her hands yet. Hiroshi Ishiguro is her ‘father' and the bad boy of Japanese robotics. Together they will redefine what it means to be human and reveal that the future is closer than we might think.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E7
programme.sub-title: The Butler, The Husband, The Wife and her Mother
programme.desc: Fran persuades the family to help her dupe a nosy cousin.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E8
programme.desc: Fran hosts a society tea for debutante Maggie.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E9
programme.desc: Though excited to learn that she will be working on Christmas Day, Fran is surprised to hear that Maxwell will be producing a benefit in Washington D.C. Told that the Sheffields will celebrate Christmas one day early, Fran is further disappointed to find that Maxwell farms out all of his gift buying to a personal shopper. So, upon finding that the children don't believe in Santa and that what Grace really wants is to have her father home on Christmas, Fran decides to have a talk with Maxwell -- until Niles points out that he is preparing the staff s Christmas bonuses. Revealing that C.C. will also be joining him in Washington but insisting that their trip will be all business, Maxwell is nonetheless persuaded to do his own shopping for a change. So, when Fran relies on Niles' assessment of her bonus and buys the children some expensive gifts, she discovers that, instead of money, Maxwell bought her a beautiful vase. Faced with having to either take back her gifts or somehow pay the bill, Fran declines Niles' offer of a loan and goes to see Val's Uncle Paulie to pawn the vase. But, when Maxwell mentions it later, Fran guiltily rushes to buy it back and, forced to pay twice what she got, sells her grandmother's watch instead. Receiving a call from Niles with word about Fran and the watch, Maxwell decides to make things right. So, leaving C.C. behind at the airport, he intercepts the family at St. Patrick's Cathedral and finds Fran in a confessional seeking help with her financial difficulties. Finally, after returning the watch and then accidentally sitting on the vase, Maxwell ends up at the hospital being treated for his wounds, while Grace gets her wish and renews her belief in Santa Claus.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E10
programme.desc: Fran contends with Maxwell's old nanny.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E11
programme.desc: Fran's birthday gift leads to a date with a handsome mortician.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E12
programme.desc: Fran and Maxwell clash over Grace's school pageant.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E13
programme.desc: Chloe Simpson, a 1960s supermodel, re-enters ex-flame Maxwell's life, turning the Sheffield household upside down and interfering with the relationship between Fran and Maggie.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E14
programme.desc: Maxwell reveals he has a double standard when it comes to his children and the opposite sex.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E15
programme.desc: While examining Grace for symptoms of the flu, the doctor takes a look at Fran's throat and immediately orders her to the hospital to have her tonsils removed. Meanwhile, C.C. convinces Maxwell to attend her college reunion -- as her "amour," but her plans are foiled when Maxwell stands her up in order to stay by Fran's bedside.

programme.title: The Nanny S1E16
programme.desc: The entire Sheffield clan, including C.C. and Fran, spends the weekend "vacationing" at Fran's parents' house when a blizzard closes the airports and maroons them in Queens. While stranded at the Fines' home, Maggie falls for the boy next door, C.C. crawls in bed with Niles, and Fran finds a love note to her mother -- that's not from her father.

programme.title: Dragons' Den CA
programme.desc: In business, it's all about the pitch – that elusive ability of an entrepreneur to stand tall, talk smart, and capture an audience whenever and wherever opportunity knocks. Each week, with big investment dollars on the line, real-life business owners must pitch like a pro under the dead-eyed scrutiny of five self-made business titans, known as 'The Dragons'. Succeed in this high stakes environment and the reward could be life changing, as the aspiring entrepreneur not only secures financing but the prestige of a coveted Dragon as a mentor and partner. Sold in every continent, Dragons' Den shows viewers around the world the inspiring stories of hard-working business owners and the transformational power of entrepreneurship.

programme.title: The Chase

programme.title: The Weakest Link
programme.desc: Anne Robinson presents the quick-fire general knowledge quiz where contestants answer questions to add to a shared prize pot, and vote after each round for what they perceive to be the weakest contestant in the group.

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: The format of `Pointless Celebrities' is the same as the original version of `Pointless' with the big difference being celebrities playing for charities instead of regular contestants playing to win money for themselves. The famous pairs answer questions that were asked to 100 people in a survey. The celebrities' goal is to provide the correct answers that were given by the fewest surveyed individuals with a correct answer given by nobody else, dubbed a pointless answer, being most desirable as it earns the team no points, which is good in a game in which the goal is to score as few points as possible. The winning pair advances to the final round where they can win money for their chosen charities.

programme.title: Cash Trapped
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents the big money quiz based on his own idea which features six players who cannot leave the contest until somebody wins.

programme.title: Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp presents the quiz show where a team of four work colleagues, Lucy, Fiona, Shannon and Janet, take on the Bridge of Lies. One by one they all face the Bridge, choosing who faces each crossing depending on the question category.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Former `Top Gear' presenter and opinionated `The Sunday Times' and `The Sun' columnist Jeremy Clarkson presents the rebooted version of `Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?', the 12-question quiz with a £1,000,000 prize. Each contestant can use three traditional lifelines: 50-50 which removes half of the answers, Ask the Audience which polls the studio audience for their answer, and Phone a Friend, wherein the contestant can call a friend for 30 seconds to ask for their advice. However, there is now a fourth lifeline: Ask the Host, where the contestant can ask Clarkson if he knows the answer to the question, and there is also a new second `safety net', previously set at £32,000, which is now able to be set by the contestant themselves. Also, contestants must first win their chance to play the quiz by winning the Fastest Fingers First round, competing against other potential players to be the quickest to answer a question with sequenced answers.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E6

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E8
programme.desc: Bo's freelance work earns her a lead on someone who might know something about her mother... but the trail ends at Lou Ann, a death row inmate who claims not to know anything about Bo. Desperate to prove otherwise, and increasingly convinced Lou Ann is innocent Bo uses all her political wiles to try and bust her out of jail. When she has to admit defeat, Bo's goal switches to one of personal vengeance: to find Vex, the Fae that framed Lou Ann, and make him pay.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E1
programme.sub-title: It's A Fae, Fae, Fae, Fae World

Told that her strange abilities stem from the fact that she is a succubus, Bo faces the choice of declaring allegiance to one of two competing Fae clans as she teams up with Kenzi to search for the truth about her mysterious past.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E2
programme.sub-title: Where There's A Will, There's A Fae
programme.desc: As she and Kenzi (Ksenia Solo) are setting up their new home, a Fae fairy named Will (guest star Richard McMillan) offers to share some clues about Bo's (Anna Silk) past if she will help recover his stolen treasure. But when Bo finds the thief (guest star Elias Toufexis), his motives uncover a surprise for her Fae fairy client.

programme.title: Lost Girl S1E3
programme.desc: Following a college coed's mysterious disappearance, Bo (Anna Silk) joins campus security and Kenzi (Ksenia Solo) pledges a sorority in order to investigate. Jog Jakarta, popular for the Borobudur temple is her next stop where she also visits the Batik embroidery factory, ending with a joyride on a bling-bling car and visit to Malioboro street.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland Edinburgh
programme.desc: Robbie's journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

Wanting to recreate those blissful moments, she heads off to this town nestled on the banks of the mighty river Ganga, where pilgrims and weary souls come to find respite. Little does she know that, in her short stay there, the town is going to open her eyes to the joys of slow living.

programme.title: The Black Knight
programme.desc: It seems the NEXO-Knights are attacking villages throughout the realm! But why? A mysterious Black Knight appears to defend the cities from the rogue NEXO-villains! Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they're booed and pelted with food. Why does everyone hate them? To make matters more confusing, a giant Mech Suit in black – The BLACK KNIGHT – appears to defend the kingdom's villages from the fake knights. The Black Knight ends up being very powerful and throws Jestro and his fake knights for a loop. He's cool and mysterious. But when the fake Knights get the better of him, the REAL NEXO-Knights appear to fend them off and learn their deceptive secret. The Knights save the Black Knight and they open him up to find…young ROBIN! (He used a deep, deceptive voice.) The Knights realize that Robin has potential. But maybe he still has some learning to do.

programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.title: Emma's Dilemma
programme.desc: When Stephanie becomes obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in a float building contest and accidentally disregards Emma's ideas and design, Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to get revenge on Stephanie. When the girls enter a float-building contest, Emma is especially excited to share her design idea for the float. But no one is listening to her, especially Stephanie, who's become obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in the contest. Emma finally does find someone who appreciates her design… Tanya! Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to build the float design. But is Tanya just using Emma to get revenge on Stephanie?

programme.title: Friends of The Jungle
programme.desc: When Olivia's Aunt Sophie is getting married and the groom has gone missing in the jungle, the girls fly out to the jungle in secret to try to find him in time for the wedding. The girls are super excited to be planning a wedding for Olivia's Aunt Sophie. There's just one little problem: Olivia learns that the groom has gone missing in the jungle while working at an animal rescue station! Not wanting to worry her aunt, Olivia, Stephanie and Mia secretly fly to the jungle to try and find the groom, Henry, rescuing a few animals along the way. Too bad Emma and Andrea couldn't keep the secret back in Heartlake City. Now, Sophie, Emma and Andrea join the others in the jungle to try and find Henry before the rapidly approaching wedding date!

programme.title: Can Of Worms
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago. The Ninja are not faring well, when a mysterious Samurai shows up and saves the day.

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: The Golden Castle
programme.desc: When Lance is cast as the star in the new remake of the classic movie “Ned Knightly and the Golden Castle” he doesn't anticipate Jestro and his monsters invading the set and ruining his starring role. It's movie time! Lance does something very Lance: he agrees to star in a movie about remake of a classic film in Knighton: “The Golden Castle.” While pillaging a village, Jestro and the Book of Monsters see a movie poster for “The Golden Castle” and the book says the legendary Golden Castle is filled with riches! Jestro explains that it's just a dumb movie and that it's not real. It's all based on a “script.” The Book, who's been shelved for many years, wants to eat the movie script to learn more about the modern world. On the set of the movie, Lance has invited the other Knights to act as extras. When they see how Lance is being portrayed, they're incensed. When Jestro attacks the movie set to get the script for his book to eat, the film director keeps rolling. This battle footage is fantastic! The Knights defeat Jestro even though the movie set is trashed. The director will make it work. At the premier of the movie, Lance is embarrassed to see that he's been reduced to comic relief for the realm's bravest Knight…Macy! The director has now made her a star.

programme.title: The Maze Of Amazement
programme.desc: The Knights find themselves trapped in a maze looking for the Book of Deception. But will they actually get their hands on it, or will it keep deceiving them? The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl's home town of DIGGINGTON (where they realize that all of Axl's family look just like him.) While they're there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books! It's “The Book of Deception.” They go to find it and discover it ended up under a mountain. And, to make matters worse, the magic book has built a maze around itself to keep it from being found (it is deceptive!) As the NEXO-Knights enter the maze from one side, Jestro enters from the other the Book of Monsters has led him to the maze to get The Book of Deception, too. It's a race through this confusing maze to see who can get the book first. Ava figures out the maze is the Whackman maze from a videogame. After help from Axl's people to defeat Jestro and win the book, the knights discover it's a FAKE BOOK of deception. The Book of Deception created a fake copy of itself!

programme.title: The Black Knight
programme.desc: It seems the NEXO-Knights are attacking villages throughout the realm! But why? A mysterious Black Knight appears to defend the cities from the rogue NEXO-villains! Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they're booed and pelted with food. Why does everyone hate them? To make matters more confusing, a giant Mech Suit in black – The BLACK KNIGHT – appears to defend the kingdom's villages from the fake knights. The Black Knight ends up being very powerful and throws Jestro and his fake knights for a loop. He's cool and mysterious. But when the fake Knights get the better of him, the REAL NEXO-Knights appear to fend them off and learn their deceptive secret. The Knights save the Black Knight and they open him up to find…young ROBIN! (He used a deep, deceptive voice.) The Knights realize that Robin has potential. But maybe he still has some learning to do.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Ultimate Autobot Hunter is unleashed on our heroes.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Bee Team allies with Windblade, another Decepticon-hunting Autobot, to take on Zizza.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An educational trip turns into a Decepticon hunt as Bee and the Bots stumble upon the shape-shifter Pseudo.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime prepares to return to Earth to face the mysterious Great Evil he's prophesied to Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Earth's most accomplished game hunter has his sights set on a new target: the head of Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: It's Decepticon versus Decepticon when triple changers Astrotrain and Blitzwing decide to seize power.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus teams up with Sentinel Prime in order to defeat the Headmaster.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Unaware of the Decepticon activity, the Elite Guard take Optimus Prime and the Autobots back to Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The AllSpark creates a new Autobot out of pieces of garbage.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Led by a new member, Team Prime launches a desperate assault on the Decepticon citadel.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots adjust to new group dynamics within their expanded lineup.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: As tension builds within the Wreckers, they find themselves confronted with the return of the Predacon.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfic Games: The Smurfs discover the spirit and joy of friendly competition when they hold their first "Smurfic Games". After a near miss with the troublesome cat Azrael, the Smurfs decide they need to get into better shape. Papa Smurf suggests that the Smurfs tone their bodies as well as sharpen their athletic abilities by inaugurating the "Smurfic Games".

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Fountain Of Smurf: The Smurfs discover a fountain of youth that is guarded by a wicked troll, who steals Papa Smurf's magic book. They convince Gargamel to help them and the greedy villain runs to get the water, but manages to fall in with the troll. As the two chase each other all over the countryside, the Smurfs are able to retrieve Papa Smurf's book.

programme.title: The Abominable Snowbeast
programme.desc: Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf. They meet a terrifying snow beast that befriends them, due to Smurfette's kindness, and helps them find the tiny flower.

programme.title: The Trojan Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel, the evil wizard, has devised a new plan to capture the Smurfs: he builds a giant statue in the shape of Papa Smurf. Thus, he hopes, the Smurfs are going to drag the statue into their Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Unsound Smurf: In an effort to give Papa some quiet time, Brainy uses one of Papa's spells to create a magical sound barrier around the village. Papa cannot reverse the spell and sends the Smurflings, who are trapped outside the Village, to a noisemaker. Baby takes a bottle of sound from the noisemaker, which breaks the barrier.

programme.title: Smurf Box Derby
programme.desc: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Bad Place
programme.desc: What is this little moon coming from above? Why, it's a crater-pockmarked globe of mud inhabited by the Grimeys, a family of mud-splattering, mud-eating creatures from out there in the sky. Not all the Smurfs are enthusiastic about the visitors....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Bigmouth's Friend: Gargamel and Balthazar command a giant robot to force King Gerard to hand over Clockwork Smurf. When the robot is about to destroy the castle, Clockwork's new, large, and awkward friend Bigmouth defeats the robot. Clockwork is hurt in the battle but Handy fixes him and implants a voice box so he can say "Hi"!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: He Who Smurfs Last
programme.desc: Jokey's practical jokes go too far when Chlorhydris is the victim of one. She gets her revenge on the Smurfs by creating a spell to steal their sense of humor. Grouchy, who had no sense of humor to begin with, breaks the spell by getting back the humor potion.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sassette: Snappy and Nat steal Gargamel's formula to make another Smurf – a female to be a companion to Smurfette. They create Sassette, who causes mischief wherever she goes. Papa uses his Smurfiness Solution to turn Gargamel's evil Sassette into a playful Smurfy Sassette.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Every Picture Smurfs A Story: The evil Maestro's magical paints have the power to transport his models onto canvas – forever! Papa Smurf directs Painter to switch his paints and before long, Maestro is enshrined in a picture next to his dream girl, Smurfette.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Master Smurf: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: Have You Smurfed Your Pet Today?
programme.desc: The Smurfs get so involved with Handy's new toy that they forget to feed Puppy. Gargamel lures Puppy into a cage with food and holds him for ransom – the Smurfs' magic secrets. The Smurflings distract Gargamel with the toy long enough to rescue Puppy and they vow to never neglect him again.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Worrywarts: Papa Smurf's worries make him break into a rash of worrywarts. The only way to relieve him of his bout of indecision-inducing disease is to have him rub the horn of a Wartmonger, a sloppy, slimy, stupid and brutal enemy of the Pussywillow Pixies...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Hovel Is Not A Home: In his search for a grander hovel, Gargamel looks in the Great Book of Spells to conjure up a new home. But all of his spells backfire and that convinces him that there's no place like home!

programme.title: Jokey's Joke Book
programme.desc: Jokey Smurf's joke boxes are no longer funny to the other Smurfs. Jokey finds new ideas in his Great Joke Book, but these ideas are even less popular in the Village. And here comes the evil Gargamel with a few jokes of his own...

programme.title: Essence Of Brainy
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf is not the same anymore. He is polite, considerate, modest and calls every other Smurf Sir or Madame. All the Smurfs are worried that Brainy has lost all that makes his personality. They ought to be worried, for Brainy has been the victim of a system called an Essence Remover that Scruple, Gargamel's apprentice, uses... But Brainy's essence is coming back!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Never Smurf Off Till Tomorrow: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf On Wood: The evil wizard Gargamel once again meets Esmeralda, the gypsy fortune-teller, and she finds a novel way of getting the gold coin that Gargamel imprudently shows her. But the Smurfs in their turn are tricked into believing there is such a thing as a good-luck tree...

programme.title: Stop & Go
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and the Teletubbies play a round and round game. They watch some children playing stop and go. Then they play a Ready, Steady, Go game round and round Home Hill.

programme.title: Strawberry Picking
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are having some Tubby Custard when they stop to watch some children who are going strawberry picking.

programme.title: Swan
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have trouble getting out of bed. The Teletubbies watch Andy Brown and some children feeding swans.

programme.title: Swim with Stephanie
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun falling over. The Teletubbies watch some children go swimming with Stephanie.

programme.title: The Beach
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a magical sound for the Teletubbies. The Teletubbies watch some children take their dog and a ball to the beach.

programme.title: Throwing
programme.desc: Teletubbies love to run and do exercises. The Tubbies watch a girl and a boy throwing a ball. Then they play a game together with the ball.

programme.title: Tweet Tweet
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are having their Tubby Toast when a voice trumpet brings them a message. The Teletubbies watch Alex Pascall and some children go looking for birds in the park.

programme.title: Urban Birds
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children feed some birds and watch them playing on the bird table. In Teletubbyland, it's timer for Tubby Custard, but Dipsy spills his all over a Tubby Seat. No-one wants to sit in the Tubby Custard, so Noo-Noo tidies it up.

programme.title: Wake Up
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a game before watching some children playing a game with Alex Pascall. The Teletubbies have fun playing the game of waking and sleeping, before Tubby Bye-Bye.

programme.title: Walk in the Woods
programme.desc: Laa-Laa fells like giving all the other Teletubbies a big hug. But where's Tinky Winky? The Teletubbies watch some children who are going for a walk in the woods.

programme.title: Shadows
programme.desc: Po looks after the Teletubbies' favourite things. The Teletubbies have fun watching some children making shadows.

programme.title: Sophie Art
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have fun sliding down into Home Hill. They watch some children painting circus pictures before the Lion and Bear appear in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Squirrels
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children go for a walk to find some red squirrels. The Teletubbies are playing a hiding game. Where are they? Can Noo-Noo find them?

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Funshine wants to clean up Rainshine Meadows, which is an environmental disaster, and help its inhabitants.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Oopsy wants his friends to like him, not just accept him, so he puts on some love perfume to win them over.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Oopsy is feeling un-special and gets tricked by Grizzle to help him deliver a "gift" for the Care Bears.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Funshine and Tenderheart are in a daring mood, each one trying to one-up the other with a bigger dare.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Grizzle is kicked out of his lair by his new robot! Stuck in Care-a-lot, the bears welcome him with open arms.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: The Care Bears are trying to help Grumpy, but he's getting very flustered and super bossy.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: When True Heart trips in a big way, the other Care Bears tease her about her super-stumble-bumble-mega-fall.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Grizzle accuses the Care Bears of stealing Mr. Beaks, and the bears offer to help despite his false claim.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Two clouds are lost from their cloud school and are having trouble navigating through Care-a-Lot.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Harmony Bear doesn't like surprises, so she's making sure that she stays in her house on Surprise Day.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: When the girls decide to teach their new friend about working together, some of the other bears feel left out.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: When Love-a-Lot suggests that Harmony perform a concert for Care-a-lot, Harmony's inner diva comes out.

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: It's time for Bedtime Bear to give his friends an inside look into his nightly duties!

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Funshine feels lost after losing his badge until Grizzle comes to destroy Care-a-Lot - with Funshine's badge!

programme.title: Care Bears
programme.desc: Oopsy wants to participate in the Care-a-lot Grand Prix, but he seems to be plagued with bad luck.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: The adventure in Paris continues for Ladybug and Cat Noir.

programme.title: CoComelon Dance Party!
programme.desc: In Cocomelon, baby JJ and his siblings go on fun adventures with nursery, play, exploration, and learning.

programme.title: Hello Cocomelon!
programme.desc: Say hello to JJ, YoYo and Tom Tom, and all of their friends, as they help children learn counting, colours and life lessons with toe-tapping tunes!

programme.title: Learn with Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi teaches children about the world around them in a fun and exciting way - exploring science, space, arts and crafts and learning numbers, colours, shapes, words and more.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is a fun and educational show for kids featuring classic and new nursery rhymes and loved by babies and their parents all around the world.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum: Baby Shark
programme.desc: A selection of songs and nursery rhymes by Little Baby Bum, celebrating the one and only Baby Shark!

programme.title: Learning Time with Timmy
programme.desc: Discover new words and join in the activities with Timmy and his friends in this fun learning series.

programme.title: Hailey and the Hero Hearts
programme.desc: Hailey, a charmingly meddling 7-year-old girl with bigger-than-big emotions, gets a magical heirloom bracelet for her birthday that transforms daily issues into huge adventures.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends

programme.title: A Wizard's Tale
programme.desc: Imagine a world where happiness, smiling and laughter are a thing of the past where an evil wizard presides over all that is good in the land. A WIZARD'S TALE is a magical family adventure about one boy's quest to restore happiness to the world. Join Terry on his magical quest as he outwits a multitude of weird and wonderful creatures and finds friendship with a princess along the way. From the writer of Ice Age: The Meltdown and with a stellar voice cast, including Ian McShane (John Wick, Coraline), Lily Collins (Mirror Mirror) and Toby Kebbell (Ben-Hur, Warcraft), A WIZARD'S TALE is an uplifting magical journey that is guaranteed to cast its spell on adults and children alike.

programme.title: Return to Oz
programme.desc: In the vein of the well-loved family favourite, this enchanting story of friendship and love is a fun-filled adventure! Emerald City is in danger again and it is down to Dorothy and her loyal dog Toto to save Magic Land. With the help of Scarecrow, the Tin Man and Lion, they must defeat the wicked toy-maker and his army of wooden soldiers after he steals a magic book which he uses to grant wishes that will destroy the people of Magic Land. Together they set out on a treacherous adventure to restore happiness in Emerald City.

programme.title: Sheep & Wolves: A Pig Deal
programme.desc: From the writer of Disney's 'Beauty & the Beast' comes a woolly, woolly fun adventure the whole family will enjoy! A united village of sheep and wolves are suddenly thrown in to chaos after an unexpected guest arrives with the aim of destroying their peaceful and quiet life. The towns new leader, Grey, embarks on a heroic mission to prove that team work really does make the best work as he unites his tribe.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel creates the legend of Sorcerer Smurf to lure Papa Smurf and his smurfy friends into a trap at his mountain hideaway. | The Smurfs find a "meanie genie" that refuses to grant them their wishes until they call out the magic word.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Lazy dreams he is on Paradise Island and free from all the work Papa Smurf inflicts on him. His fantasy turns into a nightmare that sends him eagerly back to work once more. | Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A terrible giant called Bigmouth helps Gargamel hunt the Smurfs so he can feast on Soup a la Smurf. Papa Smurf tricks the big monster and then convinces him that Soup a la Gargamel is a far more appetizing dish than smurfy soup.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf's growth potion is accidentally spilled on a Howlibird that grows into a giant creature. After much thought, Papa Smurf uses his anti-growth formula on the bird and soon it and the Smurf village return to normal.

programme.title: Corneil & Bernie: Stroke of Genius
programme.desc: Bernie has been given detention for bad grades at school. He has brought Corneil along with him to keep him company. When Corneil solves a difficult chemical equation, Bernie is mistakenly credited with it and hailed as a genius… and his troubles really begin. Will Corneil be able to get him out of this mess?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy gives Smurfette a pair of rose-colored glasses that are instrumental in luring her into Gargamel's clutches. | Dreamy leaves his fellow Smurfs to seek adventure and ends up in Gargamel's giant cauldron.

programme.title: The Rabbids are escaping!
programme.desc: John the scientist is trapped inside a rabbid's body, and gets thrown into the junkyard.

programme.title: Rabbid Energy
programme.desc: Mad Rabbid and his assistant get stuck in prehistoric times when the teleporta-TV runs out of juice.

programme.title: Rabbid Hibernation and the time machine.
programme.desc: After it breaks down in the middle of the desert, Hibernation Rabbid's Machine is stolen by the rabbids.

programme.title: The Rabbids are panicking!
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, two Rabbids become convinced that their boss has turned into a balloon.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get locked inside a supermarket for the night.

programme.title: The Rabbids are making a mess!
programme.desc: After discovering the joys of tennis, the Rabbids move the game onto an airport runway.

programme.title: The Rabbids are escaping!
programme.desc: John the scientist is trapped inside a rabbid's body, and gets thrown into the junkyard.

programme.title: The Rabbids are morons.
programme.desc: In order to get a little, Hibernation Rabbid divides the Junkyard into two separate zones with a border fence.

programme.title: Dr Mad Rabbid is out of control!
programme.desc: Mad Rabbid has found a great way to become invisible, now he just needs a guinea pig to test it.

programme.title: The Rabbids lead the investigation.
programme.desc: When a thief robs a piece from Hibernation Rabbid's Teleporta-TV, Investigator Rabbid leads the investigation

programme.title: The Rabbids make their cinema.
programme.desc: A cowboy rabbid has come back to town looking for the outlaw rabbid who destroyed his rocking horse.

programme.title: Revenge of the Rabbids.
programme.desc: Blasted into the Polar Regions when his secret HQ explodes, Evil Rabbid raises a penguin army!

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: GWR Incredible Record Breakers
programme.desc: Guinness World Records presents Incredible Record Breakers from all over.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E4
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E5
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E6
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E7
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E8
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E9
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E10
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E11
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E12
programme.desc: The Beyblade World Tag Team Championships are about to start in Rome as Barthez busily prepares his team for the big event. He's even invited a television news crew to document his efforts as a coach.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E13
programme.desc: Tyson gets in a huff and leaves the team after he is dropped from the lineup against the Blitzkrieg Boys. This leaves Kenny and Daichi to pick up the slack against their opponents.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E14
programme.desc: In the second of a best of three match, Tala thinks he's broken Kenny down, but Kenny summons his inner strength and attacks with all of his combined power. Unfortunately, it's not enough, and Tala shatters Kenny's Hopper into pieces with his Novae Rog attack.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E15
programme.desc: In Madrid for the Spanish leg of the World Championships, the hard-of-sleeping Lee has a nightmare that Ray kicks him off the team for his poor play. The day before their next match, White Tiger X encounters a pair of beyblading jugglers in Madrid's main square, who also happen to be trick bladers.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E16
programme.desc: As Max prepares to face Kai in the next round, the members of BBA Revolution overhear a confrontation between Johnny and Robert of the Majestics and Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E17
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution are slated to face the sneaky Barthez Battalion, but while Hilary and Kenny want to report their dirty deeds to the authorities, Tyson believes the best way to teach them a lesson is to beat them fair and square...But that's before he really sees how low the team will sink to win.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E18
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E19
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: Jay's favourite volleyball player is playing at the local stadium, and Jay really wants to go but he isn't allowed out at night In order to make the daytime last longer, Rekkit steals the moon from the sky.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: To keep Lorne happy, Jay agrees to take part in the Little Mister Potato Guy contest, even though he is mortified and embarrassed.

programme.title: Rekkit Rabbit: Rekkit Rabbit
programme.desc: When Rekkit tries swimming in the lake, he becomes so scared of water that he gathers up the town's whole water supply in his magic bucket and pours it into a painting.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Operation Ouch
programme.desc: The Doctors demonstrate how our body movements are controlled by confusing their very own brains! Dr Chris lets a blood-sucking leech feed on his arm and Dr Xand goes on call with an emergency ambulance team. Meanwhile over in accident and emergency, a patient has locked their jaw wide open and another needs stitches after a particularly nasty fall...

programme.title: Dennis & Gnasher
programme.desc: Cat-astrophic comedy capers with the wise-cracking, nap-taking and lasagne-loving cat Garfield.

programme.title: Science Max
programme.desc: Have you ever done a science experiment and wondered “What would this be like if it were HUGE?” - Welcome to Science Max, the exciting series that turbocharges science experiments.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: Grojband follows the story of a band of the same name formed by Corey Riffin as they work together to propel their band to international stardom.

programme.title: Rabbids Invasion
programme.desc: We don't know where they came from. We don't know how they got here. But we do know this: they're here to play!

programme.title: Numb Chucks
programme.desc: Woodchuck brothers, Dilweed and Fungus, have devoted their lives to doing good deeds and protecting the town of Ding-a-Ling Springs using their imaginary "kung fu" skills.

programme.title: Bakugan: Beyond the Brawl
programme.desc: Bakugan brings you small brawl stories which take you beyond the brawl - mini adventures featuring Dan, The Awesome Ones and the special abilities of their Bakugan.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Grandfather tells Pingu about the moon and he desperately wants to visit. With Pinga's help, Pingu makes a rocket from a barrel, some tin foil and snow.

programme.title: Ria Rabbit: A Is For Ant / B Is For Ball / C Is For Cup / D Is For Doll / E Is For Engine / F Is For Fox / G Is For Grasshopper / H Is For Hat / I Is For Island
programme.desc: A cute and engaging video where each letter is taught with its alphabet letter sound.

programme.title: The Adventures of Bob Zoom: The Storm / The Zip Line
programme.desc: In the middle of another adventure, the gang has to hide, because it started raining. What seemed to be a tedious day, in fact, becomes a very beautiful one when they realize that observing nature can be quite fun. / The adventure of the day is high above, as Bob Zoom saw a lucky clover on the branch of the apple tree. They decide to make a zip line to reach the lucky clover.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella the Packrat
programme.desc: Prunella saves everything. Can Arthur help her break her packrat habits in time to put together the display for the school's Earth Day fair?

programme.title: Badanamu Cadets: The Snow Ecco Surprise
programme.desc: The Cadets are in the middle of a seal-saving operation when they are attacked by the Snow Ecco. Turns out, it is being controlled by none other than Esme. The Cadets must put their heads together to stop Esme and her evil plan.

programme.title: Badanamu Stories: Mimi's Color Secret
programme.desc: Bada wants to climb a tree, Abby wants to go to the pumpkin patch, and Mipi wants to pick grapes. However, they can't go out in the storm, so Mimi comes up with a plan.

programme.title: Blippi Wonders: Astronauts / Library / Diwali
programme.desc: Blippi flies into outer space with D.Bo where they meet Rihanna the rocket. Blippi floats in zero gravity, eats astronaut food, and even performs a space walk to fix Rihanna۪s navigation system! / Blippi, Tabbs, and Babble meet Catie Caterpillar and go on a wild library cart ride through the library and past various sections of subjects until they finally arrive at the enormous room full of books all about dinosaurs! / Blippi, Meekah, and Tabbs go to India in this super colorful episode where they meet Deep the diya and work together to help him light the traditional lanterns for Diwali all while dancing to a Bollywood beat.

programme.title: Everything's Rosie: How To Teach a Bear to Meet the Queen
programme.desc: BIG BEAR receives an invitation to have tea with the Queen!

programme.title: Pom Pom and Friends: Pom Pom Comes to His Senses / A Gift from Pom Pom / The Teddy Bears Problem
programme.desc: Pom Pom and May set out to pick watermelons, but the road gets foggy and they are unable to see anything. They end up using their five senses to get the watermelon so their friends can enjoy the delic

programme.title: Heroes of Goo Jit Zu: Gooing Under
programme.desc: Thrash is venturing into the ocean to find the source of those strange deep sea Goo signals. The ocean in this area seems to have a Goo-ish green glow that enters Thrash's body and activates his Deep Goo Sea Goo-volution. As he dives deeper, an entire undersea civilization appears in front of him! Temple-like buildings, cobblestone streets, and a magnificent statue of KING HYDRA!

programme.title: The Wiggles World: Little, Little, Little Lord Fauntleroy
programme.desc: What?s happening in The Wiggles World today? The Wiggles are joined by Little, Little, Little Lord Fauntleroy, who is here to play music. Anthony plays the director and fun ensues. ëThe Cartoon Wiggles? are here in an all-new animated music video, ëShirley Shawn The Unicorn?.

programme.title: The Adventures of Teddy Ruxpin: The Faded Fobs

programme.title: Carl's Car Wash: Betty's Tomato Truck / Gus's Garbage Truck / Tony's Taxi Cab
programme.desc: When Betty's tomato truck hits a bump in the road, her truck becomes a tomato-y mess! So, she floors it to Carl's Car Wash where Carl goes through his three-point checklist and decides her tomato truck needs medium messy treatment. Betty pays five tokens and heads into the car wash. She leaves all tidied up! / Gus the Garbage Truck driver is doing a dumpster pickup when SPLAT, the trash lands all over his truck. What a stinky mess! Gus swings over to Carl's Car Wash, where Carl goes through his evaluation process and decides that Gus's truck a big garbage salad with a side of stink! So, Gus pays seven tokens and drives into the car wash. He rolls out sparkling clean. His truck never looked so good! / After Tony drops Ivan off, Fiona's Fire Truck zooms by and splashes mud all over Tony's Taxi! Tony needs to get cleaned up fast – time is money! After a quick vehicle evaluation, Tony counts 10 tokens and drops them into the machine deposit. He rolls into the car wash and gets his taxi all tidied up! Carl gives Tony a tip – to stay away from puddles. Tony drives away, one happy customer!

programme.title: Hi Opie!: Opie Tries Something New / Opie's Friend Benjamin / The Case of The Sparkle Monster
programme.desc: It's Food From Around the World Day. Opie brings his invisible friend Benjamin to kindergarten. Opie plays detective to solve a mystery.

programme.sub-title: I've Got So Much To Give / Mahalo / My Energy / One Seed [Official Video]
programme.desc: Laurie Berkner sings "I've Got So Much To Give" from her album "Superhero!" / "Mahalo", that means "Thank you!" A song about gratitude for babies, toddlers, and kids. Learn sign language with this sweet lullaby that features American Sign Language. / Laurie Berkner sings "My Energy!" It's a fun song to move and dance along to when you're home with your family and have lots of energy! / Laurie Berkner sings "One Seed!" This popular children's song about the environment teaches all of us to love our planet.

programme.title: Emma!: La, La, La Lilou / I've Got My Glasses On / Take A Trip Out On The Sea
programme.desc: Today is European Dance day! Emma finds a dainty ballerina necklace in her music box. Then it's time to do ballet with Emma to 'La La La Lilou'. / Today is a glasses wearing day! Emma finds a special cleaning wipe for her glasses. Then it's time to dance and sing with Emma. She can see clearly now, she has her glasses on! / Today is Dancing day! Emma finds a miniature pointe shoe in her music box. Emma puts on her own pointe shoes to dance the ballet! You can dance along too.

programme.desc: In the middle of another adventure, the gang has to hide, because it started raining.
